scripts.test:domain: bun test src/workflow src/board src/attempts/inspectorProjection.test.ts src/attempts/runnableValidator.test.ts src/host/recovery.test.ts src/host/reviewDisposition.test.ts
scripts.test:rpc: bun test test/desktopShell.test.ts test/workflowBoard.integration.test.ts test/settingsRpc.integration.test.ts test/recoveryReview.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:acp: bun test src/attempts src/attention test/attempt-inspector.integration.test.ts test/followUpQueue.integration.test.ts test/recoveryReview.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:acceptance: bun run test:domain && bun run test:sqlite && bun run test:rpc && bun run test:acp && bun run test:worktree && bun run test:smoke
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test:acceptance && bun run test:coverage
